name: Ryouko Hakubi
description: Ryoko Hakubi is a main character in the Tenchi Muyo! metaseries. She is a semi-reformed space pirate who is madly in love with Tenchi Masaki, the main protagonist. She is always shown to have a very competitive relationship with Princess Ayeka, who also has a very strong romantic interest in Tenchi. In the Tenchi Muyo OVA Ryoko is a binary clone, the product of combining the DNA from an ova of Washu Hakubi with the DNA of a powerful aquatic lifeform, known as Masu. In the Pretty Sammy OVA, Ryoko

name: Taiju Shiba
description: __Height:__ 198 cm The Black Dragon's 10th leader and [Hakkai](https://anilist.co/character/167842/Hakkai-Shiba)'s and [Yuzuha](https://anilist.co/character/170482/Yuzuha-Shiba)'s elder brother. Taiju is brutal and abusive. He enjoys tormenting his opponents and has little care for others' wellbeing, even his own siblings'. He doesn't care who his opponent is regardless of gender. He is Catholic and has a cross tattooed on his back.

name: Yumina Urnea Belfast
nativeName: ユミナ・エルネア・ベルファスト
description: A Princess of Belfast, and daughter of King Tristwin and Queen Yuel. Yumina met Touya when he heals her father from an attempted poisoning. Yumina possess the Null magic "Mystic Eyes", an ability that comes from her Heterochromic Eyes which give her the ability to see a person's true nature. Due to this power, upon seeing the selfless and kind aura surrounding Touya after he saves her father, she asks to be engaged to him, believing that she will never find a better candidate to be her husband.

name: Liao Diao He
description: He Liao Diao is the last known descendent of the Kyuumei Mountain Tribe, which was destroyed in the war with Yang Duanhe , king of the Qin mountains. As a result of this, she moved to Kokuhi village, a place of outlaws in which she eventually encounters and befriends Ying Zheng and Li Xin . She becomes an expert in blowing poisonous needles using a hollow bamboo stem acquired following the defeat of the assassin Muta by Xin. name: Rin Nohara
description: __Rank:__ Chuunin Rin, a medical ninja, was the teammate of Hatake Kakashi and Uchiha Obito during the Kakashi Gaiden arc. She is a sweet and friendly girl who cares for her teammates. She is also the one who implanted Obito's left eye into Kakashi, giving him his Sharingan. She has intimate feelings for Kakashi. ~!It's revealed that she's dead, stated when Kakashi is killed by Pain. This death of Rin was the start of conflict within Obito. name: Uka Ishimori
description: In middle school she was given the nickname "stone" and afterwards she became a withdrawn girl who had forgotten how to cry or laugh. By coincidence, she met [Kai](https://anilist.co/character/162041/Kai-Miura) after enrolling at Hachimitsu High School.

name: Walter C. Dornez
nativeName: ウォルター・C（クム）・ドルネーズ
description: Walter C. Dornez is the butler of Integra Hellsing, but is at the same time a deadly combatant, wielding high-velocity microfilament wires (dubbed by fans "The Dental Floss Of Doom"), and fought together with Alucard in the Second World War to stop a certain groups attempt at creating an undead army.

name: Aaduo
description: The Pure consort, residing in the Garner Palace within the inner court. She was the current Emperor's milk sibling and childhood crush, being just a year older than him. She became the previous Emperor's consort and gave birth to his child at 18, who was stillborn. The ordeal made her infertile, but circumstances between her and the royal family allowed her to keep her position as a High Consort. She is very spartan on the outside yet has a motherly side to her. ~!She is Jinshi's real mother!~

name: Asura
description: The first-generation Kishin and one of the Great Old Ones whose affinity to madness resides in fear. He formerly served as one of the Warlords of the Eight Reaper Legions, being its most powerful member until he betrayed the group and became a Kishin, killing innocents to gain power through their souls and even consuming his own demon weapon partner, as well as two other Great Old Ones. After his betrayal he was sealed away by [Death](https://anilist.co/character/8457/Shinigami), and remained se

name: Beatrice Redden
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2") A classic Yandere, therefore she is stronger and more skilled than most girls. Bibi exhibits psychopathic traits, is bubbly and clingy and considers most people to be beneath her. ~!She is now married to [Amy Lee](https://anilist.co/character/295481/Amy-Lee) and has adopted two children with her, Jerry and Alice.!~

name: Hina
description: She is a solitary girl who lived before with her mom on the mountains. Now she had been traveled around this world looking for The Legendary Red Baron. Her "Count" is, initially, 441. ~!Her Count stays for how many hundreds of kilometers her mother walked. 44100 km, accordingly. In chapter 2, her Count is increased to 760 after Licht wins the game of "The Startheft Bout" for her.!~

name: Jack the Ripper
nativeName: ジャック・ザ・リッパー
description: Jack the Ripper, the Legendary Serial Killer (伝説の連続殺人鬼, Densetsu no Shiriaru Kiraa), is a Servant of the Assassin class and one of the main characters in Fate/Apocrypha. She is a young girl who embodies contradiction itself, combining the dual natures of "day" and "night." She displays a childish manner of speech, but she is truly quick of thought. name: Kanon Hisui
description: Kanon Hisui is a Ranger and a member of Green Battalion, with the rank of Junior First Class.

name: Lisara Restall
description: __Race:__ Shinigami The heroine of the story and a beautiful Goddess of Death, who has came to the human world to find the ''Singular Man''. Ryosuke first encounters her when he sees her drenched in the rain. She later makes a contract with Ryosuke, and tries to take away his perverted spirit.

name: Masami Kondou
description: __Occupation:__ Garden Manager He is a kind and easygoing person who gets along amicably with almost everyone, though he strives to be friends with his subordinates at work. However, his soft nature makes him "weak" in the eyes of Kobo, the assistant manager, owing to his lack of assertiveness. He puts in an adequate amount of effort at work, with his mind seemingly fixated on his other passion – literature. name: Miwa Inuzuka
description: **Height:** 166 cm (5'5") She got her hair styled like [Shiina Ringo](https://anilist.co/staff/103213) in order to fuel her creative process. Likes the fine arts and literature, but also enjoys more niche, sub-cultural hobbies.

name: Nagi Amano
description: He is [Hina](https://anilist.co/character/139710)'s younger brother who is an elementary student. Despite being young, he is popular with the girls due to his "mature behavior". (Source: Tenki no Ko Wikia, edited)

name: Uzu Sanageyama
description: Sanageyama Uzu is one of Four Kings. He is the Head of the Sports Club. ~!After losing a battle to Ryuuko Matoi, he resolves himself to ask Iori Shirou to sew his eyes shut.!~ ~!After the events of episode 17, he and the other 4 kings join Nudist Beach.!~
